race.description: Aggies Race Day September 19 On Sale Now Mdn Hcp
race.comment: ROCKABYE ROXY (5) is desperate to break through soon, finishing second in all three runs back this prep. Has been closing strongly from the back, so if she can settle a bit closer this time they shouldn't be able to stop her. SEGURO (6) has struggled to put two good runs together but was better here last time when sent forward. Strips rock-hard fit but will need a smart steer from out there. STAR ROYAL (14) was okay fresh when in the market over this trip at Wodonga. Better for that run and is in the mix. BROKEN IMAGE (9) has had plenty of chances to get off the mark but can find a minor spot on his better efforts.
